title: Brotein Premium Monthly rejected again — App Review notes
html:
Brotein Premium Monthly subscription returned by Apple — Status Rejected, "Developer Action Needed". Yahir's resubmission notes spell out the test path: from main home screen tap '+' to open the scanner/paywall page; subscription "unlocks unlimited food scanning and removes ads."

TL;DR

  • Brotein subscription rejected a second time — App Review still bouncing the localization + reviewer instructions.
  • Yahir's review-notes script: tap '+' on home → scanner/paywall page → trigger purchase to test the unlock flow.
  • Premium = unlimited food scanning + ad removal — clearest written feature definition of the paid tier so far.

brotein · app store connect · app review · subscription monetization · anabolic scoring
